# CWE-283 — Unverified Ownership (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-283-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Safe: ensures the file is owned by the authenticated uid before deletion.
func DeleteUserFile(c *gin.Context) {
	path := c.Query("path")
	info, err := os.Stat(path)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(404, gin.H{"error": "missing"})
		return
	}
	stat := info.Sys().(*syscall.Stat_t)
	if int(stat.Uid) != c.GetInt("uid") {
		c.JSON(403, gin.H{"error": "not owner"})
		return
	}
	_ = os.Remove(path)
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"removed": path})
}
